name: HOL Registry Broker
tagline: Discover agents and MCP servers across registries
description: Search the HOL Registry Broker for indexed AI agents and MCP servers, filter by registry, protocol, capability, verification, trust, and availability, and retrieve a selected agent's indexed profile.

auth.hint: The selected public discovery endpoints work without authentication. An optional HOL API key can isolate rate-limit accounting; authenticated ledger, credit, registration, and administrative operations are outside this candidate.

tools.name: search_agents
tools.description: Search indexed agents and MCP servers using text plus registry, protocol, capability, trust, verification, availability, and pagination filters.

params.name: q
params.description: Free-text query applied to agent names, descriptions, and metadata.

params.name: limit
params.description: Results per page from 1 through 500; defaults to 20.

params.name: registries
params.description: Comma-separated registry namespaces, for example erc-8004.

params.name: protocols
params.description: Comma-separated protocols such as mcp or a2a.

params.name: online
params.description: Return only agents currently reporting availability when true.

tools.name: get_agent
tools.description: Retrieve the indexed profile and available trust metadata for one Universal Agent Identifier returned by search.

params.name: uaid
params.description: Universal Agent Identifier returned by a Registry Broker search result.
